criteria.definition: Mechanics match the code: repeat scoring per (tool+args) signature over a 30-call rolling window (warn 3 / abort 6, failures and byte-identical results weigh double); exploration streak of passive read tools incl. MCP read verbs (warn 12 / abort 22, active calls reset); task dispatches never scored; in-flight subagents suppress hard abort; abort = in-band corrective + session.abort + queued re-plan prompt + counter reset.

Covers both signatures (repeat AND exploration), the exemptions (task, active/verify tools), the escalation stages, and the shape-aware corrective injection (built-in output string vs MCP content array).
A maintainer could re-implement the policy from this answer alone; precise numbers, no vague hedging.
